case_title: J AND S AUTO REPAIR INC VS. ARIK SHARABI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,600.00 FILED BY J AND S AUTO REPAIR INC AS TO DEFENDANT SHARABI, ARIK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-09-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-09-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-09-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOHN THOEE--OWNER. DEFENDANTS WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-09-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF J AND S AUTO REPAIR INC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SHARABI, ARIK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
